 {"id":"frankenjax-ynk","title":"Implement rank-2 dot eval parity","description":"fj-trace infers dot for vector/matrix combinations, but fj-lax eval_dot still rejects rank-2 tensors. Implement rank (2,1), (1,2), and (2,2) dot evaluation with row-major semantics and focused tests.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T08:44:22.624648404Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T08:55:00.054108268Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T08:55:00.052137385Z","close_reason":"Implemented rank-2 dot eval parity with matrix-vector, vector-matrix, and matrix-matrix coverage","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenjax-yxv","title":"Add depth-3+ transform composition tests (grad(vmap(f)), vmap(grad(f)), jit(grad(grad(f))))","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-02T03:31:35.860687476Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-02T03:49:00.056675281Z","closed_at":"2026-04-02T03:49:00.056422242Z","close_reason":"Added 8 new depth-3+ transform composition tests: jit(grad(grad(x^2))), grad(grad(sin)), vmap_grad_requires_scalar_inputs, grad(vmap(add_one)) error handling, jit(vmap(add_one)), composition order cache key sensitivity, grad(grad(grad(x^2)))=0 (third derivative), hardened mode grad(grad). All 55 dispatch tests pass.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenjax-zk6q","title":"Conv SAME padding panics on empty spatial dimensions","description":"[HIGH] crates/fj-lax/src/tensor_ops.rs Conv SAME padding assumes the computed output spatial dimension is nonzero. For empty spatial axes, width.div_ceil(stride) or input_size.div_ceil(stride) can return 0, then line 3123 and helper line 3324 compute out_w - 1 / out - 1 and underflow in debug/test builds. Repro 1D: lhs TensorValue::new(DType::F64, Shape { dims: vec![1,0,1] }, vec![]), rhs TensorValue::new(DType::F64, Shape { dims: vec![1,1,1] }, vec![1.0]), params { padding="same", strides="1" }, then eval_primitive(Primitive::Conv, &[lhs, rhs], &params). Expected: either an empty output tensor with shape [1,0,1] or a typed EvalError, but no panic. Actual: SAME geometry computes out_w=0 and underflows at ((out_w - 1) * stride + kernel_w). The 2D path uses compute_output_and_pad and has the same out == 0 underflow for any empty height/width with SAME padding. Add regression tests for 1D width=0 and 2D height/width=0.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-04-29T12:32:10.727381723Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-29T15:08:05.896347482Z","closed_at":"2026-04-29T15:08:05.894548015Z","close_reason":"Fixed: added early return for input_size=0 in compute_output_and_pad and 1D conv path. Added 5 regression tests for empty spatial dims.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
+{"id":"frankenjax-zmb0","title":"Hoist reduce_window input strides","description":"eval_reduce_window recomputes row-major input stride multipliers inside every window element. Precompute checked input strides once per call and reuse them in flat-index calculation while preserving overflow errors and iteration order.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-30T22:35:34.843874566Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-30T22:51:13.821969123Z","closed_at":"2026-04-30T22:51:13.820127195Z","close_reason":"Hoisted reduce_window input stride calculation, added reduce_window Criterion baseline, and aligned the transform fixture with typed I64 reduce_window output","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenjax-znf","title":"Replace e-graph not-yet-supported comment with principled UnsupportedPrimitive categorization","description":"CONTEXT: crates/fj-egraph/src/lib.rs:598 has comment Shape ops require params -- not yet supported followed by 34 primitives returning UnsupportedPrimitive. The not yet wording is misleading -- these are excluded BY DESIGN.

CHANGES REQUIRED:
  1. Replace comment with accurate doc: these primitives are architecturally excluded because the s-expression egraph cannot represent parameterized operations (shapes, axes, sub-jaxprs).
  2. Split the 34-primitive catch-all into categorized groups with per-group doc comments:
     - Shape manipulation (13): Reshape, Slice, DynamicSlice, Gather, Scatter, Transpose, BroadcastInDim, Concatenate, Pad, Rev, Squeeze, Split, ExpandDims
     - Linear algebra (5): Cholesky, Qr, Svd, TriangularSolve, Eigh
     - FFT (4): Fft, Ifft, Rfft, Irfft
     - Control flow (4): Cond, Scan, While, Switch
     - Sorting (2): Sort, Argsort
     - Convolution (1): Conv
     - Index/utility (3): Iota, BroadcastedIota, DynamicUpdateSlice
     - Type conversion (2): BitcastConvertType, ReducePrecision
     - Cumulative (2): Cumsum, Cumprod
     - Windowed (1): ReduceWindow
     - Encoding (1): OneHot
  3. Add ExclusionReason enum or string field to EGraphLoweringError::UnsupportedPrimitive so error messages say e.g. reshape excluded: requires shape parameters (not representable in algebraic e-graph).
  4. Add test: for each category, verify the error message contains the category reason.

TESTING: Existing egraph tests must still pass. New test: construct Jaxpr with each excluded primitive, call jaxpr_to_egraph, assert error message contains category keyword. Log all 34 exclusion messages.

ACCEPTANCE: The string not yet supported gone. Each exclusion has a documented reason. Error messages are informative.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-02T23:27:23.292474606Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-03T02:18:07.209270881Z","closed_at":"2026-04-03T02:18:07.209023873Z","close_reason":"Centralized egraph exclusion metadata by category, surfaced reasons in UnsupportedPrimitive errors, added full exclusion-message coverage, and verified with rch cargo test -p fj-egraph plus workspace check/clippy/fmt","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenjax-zrp","title":"Add NaN/Inf gradient propagation tests for AD edge cases","description":"CONTEXT: The AD engine (fj-ad) has no tests verifying how NaN and Inf propagate through VJP/JVP rules. JAX propagates NaN faithfully: grad(sin)(NaN) = NaN, grad(exp)(Inf) = Inf. Silent NaN-to-zero or Inf-to-zero conversion in gradient rules would be a correctness bug that goes undetected.

SCOPE: Add targeted tests in crates/fj-ad/src/lib.rs verifying:
  1. NaN propagation: grad(sin)(NaN)=NaN, grad(cos)(NaN)=NaN, grad(exp)(NaN)=NaN, grad(log)(NaN)=NaN, grad(tanh)(NaN)=NaN, grad(x^2)(NaN)=NaN
  2. Inf propagation: grad(exp)(Inf)=Inf, grad(log)(0+)=Inf or -Inf, grad(x^2)(Inf)=Inf, grad(1/x)(0)=(-Inf or NaN)
  3. Mixed: grad(x*y) where x=NaN, y=finite
  4. Backward pass with NaN cotangent: vjp(sin, 1.0, NaN) should produce NaN gradient
  5. JVP with NaN tangent: jvp(sin, 1.0, NaN) should produce NaN output tangent

TESTING: Each test checks is_nan() or is_infinite() on the gradient output. Use descriptive assertion messages. Log each test case.

ACCEPTANCE: All NaN/Inf propagation tests pass. No gradient rule silently converts NaN to 0 or Inf to finite.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-04T01:12:34.991960599Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T08:56:40.638142102Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T08:56:40.635989505Z","close_reason":"Already covered by AD NaN/Inf propagation tests; verified in full workspace test run","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenjax-zsj4","title":"Extend scalar dtype promotion oracle to half precision","description":"dtype_promotion_matches_jax still excludes f16 and bf16 scalar cases as a known gap. Include f16/bf16 in the scalar oracle set, update the stale gap comment, and fix any implementation mismatch revealed by the JAX fixture.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-28T09:42:09.448480706Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-28T09:47:02.750147341Z","closed_at":"2026-04-28T09:47:02.748387769Z","close_reason":"Extended scalar dtype promotion oracle coverage to f16/bf16; dtype_promotion_matches_jax now exercises 128 cases and workspace gates pass.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
